free_text: Investigations on the systematics in (n,a) cross
sections at 14.6 MeV
High-purity (Goodfellow) samples, rectangular
(10x15 mm) shaped and 0.06-0.8 g/cm2 thick
Sample activity measurement.
Monitor of the relative change of flux in time.
Corrections were made for gamma-ray self-absorption
No information on the source of uncertainty
HW.
VZ. BIB corr.in sub.001,004,data in 011,016
On. EN: 14.7 MeV -> 14.6 MeV
VS. DECAY-DATA corrected in 048,053.
On. Major revision in 051.
